query:
SELECT l.nome, l.convenio, l.totalContatos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.naoPerturbe = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_perturbe,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'nao_contatado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as disponiveis
FROM crm_mailing_listas l
LEFT JOIN crm_mailing_contatos c ON c.listaId = l.id
GROUP BY l.id, l.nome, l.convenio, l.totalContatos
ORDER BY l.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute 
SELECT l.nome, l.convenio, l.totalContatos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.naoPerturbe = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_perturbe,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'nao_contatado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as disponiveis
FROM crm_mailing_listas l
LEFT JOIN crm_mailing_contatos c ON c.listaId = l.id
GROUP BY l.id, l.nome, l.convenio, l.totalContatos
ORDER BY l.id;
